concerns.text: T034 (Permutation baseline testing) is listed as a standalone task in Phase 5, but the plan.md and spec.md require the model accuracy to be measured AGAINST this baseline (SC-003). The task order implies the baseline is generated, but no subsequent task exists to perform the statistical comparison (p < 0.05) or halt/flag if the condition is not met. The consumer (comparison logic) is missing, leaving the dependency chain incomplete.

T011 (Data download/fetch) and T012 (Filtering) are grouped in Phase 3, but the plan.md explicitly defines a 'Strategy B' fallback (raw FASTQ + 16S processing pipeline) if pre-processed data is unavailable. T011 only mentions fetching 'pre-processed CSV/Parquet or valid HuggingFace dataset'. There is no task to implement the raw SRA download and 16S processing pipeline (DADA2/QIIME2) required by the plan's data ingestion logic, creating a missing producer for the data artifact if Strategy A fails.

The spec.md Assumptions section mandates a 'Sensitivity Analysis' (sweeping responder threshold at ±10%). No task exists in Phase 5 (or any phase) to implement, run, or report this analysis. The dependency chain for this requirement is broken; the artifact (sensitivity report) is never produced.

T020 implements CLR transformation, but the spec.md Edge Cases explicitly require excluding 'zero-variance taxa' BEFORE transformation to avoid division-by-zero. There is no task to filter zero-variance taxa prior to T020. The consumer (CLR transform) depends on a pre-condition (zero-variance removal) that is not established by a preceding task.

T042 verifies runtime < 6h, but the plan.md 'Critical Constraint' and Constitution Principle I also mandate memory usage < 7GB. There is no task to verify the memory constraint. The dependency chain for the 'Critical Constraint' is incomplete; the memory check artifact is missing.
